offers.title: Civilization VI : Civilization & Scenario Pack
offers.description: The Civilization VI - Civilization & Scenario Pack Bundle includes the following six DLC packs

offers.title: Kainga: Seeds of Civilization
offers.description: Kainga is an unusual rogue-lite village builder set in a mystical world full of massive beasts, perilous environments and rival tribes to discover and overcome.

offers.title: Civilization VI : Gathering Storm
offers.description: Explore a new land, research technology, conquer your enemies, and go head-to-head with history’s most renowned leaders as you attempt to build the greatest civilization the world has ever known.

offers.title: Civilization VI : Ethiopia Pack
offers.description: This content pack introduces Menelik II as the leader of Ethiopia. Ethiopia focuses on cities built on Hills, generating Faith and using Menelik’s “Council of Ministers” ability to boost Science and Culture.

buckets.key: Surprise Attack Pty Ltd DBA Fellow Traveller Games
